title: Cloud Operations Analyst
description: HashiCorp is hiring a Cloud Operations Analyst to help manage and optimize our infrastructure-as-code platforms. You'll work with teams using Terraform and Vault to automate and secure cloud infrastructure at scale. This fully remote role is perfect for someone who loves solving operational challenges and building tools that empower engineers worldwide. No relocation needed—work from anywhere.
responsibilities: Monitor cloud infrastructure health, performance metrics, and resource utilization across AWS, Azure, and GCP
Troubleshoot and resolve operational incidents affecting cloud deployments and services
Optimize cloud resource configurations for cost efficiency and performance
Collaborate with infrastructure and platform engineering teams on automation improvements
Document operational procedures and maintain runbooks for common issues
Participate in on-call rotation and support escalations during production incidents

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field; or equivalent hands-on experience
skills: Experience with AWS, Azure, or GCP cloud platforms
Familiarity with Terraform or Infrastructure-as-Code tools
Understanding of networking, DNS, and load balancing concepts
Scripting or programming (Bash, Python, or Go preferred)
certifications: AWS Solutions Architect Associate or equivalent certification (preferred)

benefits: Fully remote work with flexible hours
Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Professional development budget for courses and certifications
Generous PTO and mental health days
